# Chapter 7: Cascading failure in networks  (~110 pp)
- 7.1 Why networks cascade (15) · 7.2 Power-grid cascades (18) · 7.3 Financial-system cascades engineering-first (15) · 7.4 Internet routing cascades (15) · 7.5 Supply-chain cascades (12) · 7.6 Models of cascading failure (15) · 7.7 Failure section (case): 2003 North America blackout, 2008 financial crisis, 2021 Ever Given Suez blockage (20)

**Archetype**: scaling, failure, transport. **Project**: simulate a cascading failure on a small network; identify the threshold. **Exercises**: 25.
